title: Summary: Turn 21
content: The agent source directory at `src/agent` contains 21 files including repositories (`agent-instance-repository.ts`, `task-repository.ts`), services (`agent-instance-service.ts`, `pepe-result-service.ts`), templates (`agent-profile-templates.ts`, `agent-template-loader.ts`), context resolver, embedding clients (`pepe-local-embedding-client.ts`, `pepe-semantic-client.ts`), memory mirror, result ranking, supervisor, worker files, and types.
